---
title: "Quoted in *Vox* on crowdfunding and inequality"
date: "2025-10-09"
categories: [media]
outlet: "Vox"
outlet_url: "https://www.vox.com/future-perfect/464196/gofundme-crowdfunding-generosity-nonprofit-giving-charity-crisis"
---

I was quoted in Sara Herschander's article, ["What to do when every crisis needs your $20,"](https://www.vox.com/future-perfect/464196/gofundme-crowdfunding-generosity-nonprofit-giving-charity-crisis) in *Vox*, on the challenges of digital crowdfunding.
